message:
fix(fsqlite/tests): make IN subquery regression test compile

The committed test referenced fsqlite_types::Row, which doesn't exist.
Switch to the public fsqlite::Row re-export so the test actually builds
and the regression coverage takes effect.

All 5 cases pass on HEAD, confirming issue #76 is fixed in main.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
